insights.name: Daily active users (DAUs)
insights.description: Shows the number of unique users that use your app every day.
insights.hogql:
SELECT
    arrayMap(number -> plus(toStartOfInterval(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-02-15 00:00:00')), toIntervalDay(1)), toIntervalDay(number)), range(0, plus(coalesce(dateDiff('day', toStartOfInterval(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-02-15 00:00:00')), toIntervalDay(1)), toStartOfInterval(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59')), toIntervalDay(1)))), 1))) AS date,
    arrayMap(_match_date -> arraySum(arraySlice(groupArray(ifNull(count, 0)), indexOf(groupArray(day_start) AS _days_for_count, _match_date) AS _index, plus(minus(arrayLastIndex(x -> equals(x, _match_date), _days_for_count), _index), 1))), date) AS total
FROM
    (SELECT
        sum(total) AS count,
        day_start
    FROM
        (SELECT
            count(DISTINCT e.person_id) AS total,
            toStartOfDay(timestamp) AS day_start
        FROM
            events AS e
        WHERE
            and(greaterOrEquals(timestamp, toStartOfInterval(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-02-15 00:00:00')), toIntervalDay(1))), lessOrEquals(timestamp, assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59'))), equals(event, '$pageview'))
        GROUP BY
            day_start)
    GROUP BY
        day_start
    ORDER BY
        day_start ASC)
ORDER BY
    arraySum(total) DESC
LIMIT 50000

insights.name: Weekly active users (WAUs)
insights.description: Shows the number of unique users that use your app every week.
insights.hogql:
SELECT
    arrayMap(number -> plus(toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2025-12-17 00:00:00'))), toIntervalWeek(number)), range(0, plus(coalesce(dateDiff('week', toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2025-12-17 00:00:00'))), toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59'))))), 1))) AS date,
    arrayMap(_match_date -> arraySum(arraySlice(groupArray(ifNull(count, 0)), indexOf(groupArray(day_start) AS _days_for_count, _match_date) AS _index, plus(minus(arrayLastIndex(x -> equals(x, _match_date), _days_for_count), _index), 1))), date) AS total
FROM
    (SELECT
        sum(total) AS count,
        day_start
    FROM
        (SELECT
            count(DISTINCT e.person_id) AS total,
            toStartOfWeek(timestamp) AS day_start
        FROM
            events AS e
        WHERE
            and(greaterOrEquals(timestamp, toStartOfInterval(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2025-12-17 00:00:00')), toIntervalDay(1))), lessOrEquals(timestamp, assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59'))), equals(event, '$pageview'))
        GROUP BY
            day_start)
    GROUP BY
        day_start
    ORDER BY
        day_start ASC)
ORDER BY
    arraySum(total) DESC
LIMIT 50000

insights.name: Retention
insights.hogql:
SELECT
    actor_activity.start_interval_index AS start_event_matching_interval,
    actor_activity.intervals_from_base AS intervals_from_base,
    COUNT(DISTINCT actor_activity.actor_id) AS count
FROM
    (SELECT
        events.person_id AS actor_id,
        if(has(arraySort(groupUniqArrayIf(toStartOfWeek(events.timestamp, 0), and(equals(events.event, '$pageview'), and(greaterOrEquals(events.timestamp, toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-08 00:00:00')))), less(events.timestamp, toDateTime('2026-03-22 00:00:00.000000')))))) AS _start_event_timestamps, toStartOfWeek(minIf(events.timestamp, equals(events.event, '$pageview')))), _start_event_timestamps, []) AS start_event_timestamps,
        arrayMap(x -> plus(toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-08 00:00:00'))), toIntervalWeek(x)), range(0, 2)) AS date_range,
        arraySort(groupUniqArrayIf(toStartOfWeek(events.timestamp, 0), and(equals(events.event, '$pageview'), and(greaterOrEquals(events.timestamp, toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-08 00:00:00')))), less(events.timestamp, toDateTime('2026-03-22 00:00:00.000000')))))) AS return_event_timestamps,
        arrayJoin(arrayFilter(x -> greater(x, -1), arrayMap((interval_index, interval_date) -> if(equals(start_event_timestamps[1], interval_date), minus(interval_index, 1), -1), arrayEnumerate(date_range), date_range))) AS start_interval_index,
        arrayJoin(arrayConcat(if(equals(start_event_timestamps[1], date_range[plus(start_interval_index, 1)]), [0], []), arrayFilter(x -> greater(x, 0), arrayMap(_timestamp -> minus(indexOf(arraySlice(date_range, plus(start_interval_index, 1), 11), _timestamp), 1), return_event_timestamps)))) AS intervals_from_base
    FROM
        events
    WHERE
        and(in(event, tuple('$pageview')), or(equals(events.event, '$pageview'), equals(events.event, '$pageview')))
    GROUP BY
        actor_id
    HAVING
        and(1, 1)) AS actor_activity
GROUP BY
    start_event_matching_interval,
    intervals_from_base
ORDER BY
    start_event_matching_interval ASC,
    intervals_from_base ASC
LIMIT 50000

insights.name: Growth accounting
insights.description: How many of your users are new, returning, resurrecting, or dormant each week.
insights.hogql:
SELECT
    groupArray(start_of_period) AS date,
    groupArray(counts) AS total,
    status
FROM
    (SELECT
        if(equals(status, 'dormant'), negate(sum(counts)), negate(negate(sum(counts)))) AS counts,
        start_of_period,
        status
    FROM
        (SELECT
            periods.start_of_period AS start_of_period,
            0 AS counts,
            status
        FROM
            (SELECT
                minus(toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59'))), toIntervalWeek(number)) AS start_of_period
            FROM
                numbers(dateDiff('week', toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-02-15 00:00:00'))), toStartOfWeek(plus(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59')), toIntervalWeek(1))))) AS numbers) AS periods
            CROSS JOIN (SELECT
                status
            FROM
                (SELECT
                    1)
            ARRAY JOIN ['new', 'returning', 'resurrecting', 'dormant'] AS status) AS sec
        ORDER BY
            status ASC,
            start_of_period ASC
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            start_of_period,
            count(DISTINCT actor_id) AS counts,
            status
        FROM
            (SELECT
                min(events.person.created_at) AS created_at,
                arraySort(groupUniqArray(toStartOfWeek(events.timestamp))) AS all_activity,
                arrayPopBack(arrayPushFront(all_activity, toStartOfWeek(created_at))) AS previous_activity,
                arrayPopFront(arrayPushBack(all_activity, toStartOfWeek(toDateTime('1970-01-01 00:00:00')))) AS following_activity,
                arrayMap((previous, current, index) -> if(equals(previous, current), 'new', if(and(equals(minus(current, toIntervalWeek(1)), previous), notEquals(index, 1)), 'returning', 'resurrecting')), previous_activity, all_activity, arrayEnumerate(all_activity)) AS initial_status,
                arrayMap((current, next) -> if(equals(plus(current, toIntervalWeek(1)), next), '', 'dormant'), all_activity, following_activity) AS dormant_status,
                arrayMap(x -> plus(x, toIntervalWeek(1)), arrayFilter((current, is_dormant) -> equals(is_dormant, 'dormant'), all_activity, dormant_status)) AS dormant_periods,
                arrayMap(x -> 'dormant', dormant_periods) AS dormant_label,
                arrayConcat(arrayZip(all_activity, initial_status), arrayZip(dormant_periods, dormant_label)) AS temp_concat,
                arrayJoin(temp_concat) AS period_status_pairs,
                period_status_pairs.1 AS start_of_period,
                period_status_pairs.2 AS status,
                person_id AS actor_id
            FROM
                events
            WHERE
                and(notEquals(properties.$process_person_profile, 'false'), greaterOrEquals(events.timestamp, minus(toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-02-15 00:00:00'))), toIntervalWeek(1))), less(events.timestamp, plus(toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59'))), toIntervalWeek(1))), equals(event, '$pageview'))
            GROUP BY
                actor_id)
        GROUP BY
            start_of_period,
            status)
    WHERE
        and(lessOrEquals(start_of_period, toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59')))), greaterOrEquals(start_of_period, toStartOfWeek(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-02-15 00:00:00')))))
    GROUP BY
        start_of_period,
        status
    ORDER BY
        start_of_period ASC)
GROUP BY
    status
LIMIT 50000

insights.name: Referring domain (last 14 days)
insights.description: Shows the most common referring domains for your users over the past 14 days.
insights.hogql:
SELECT
    sum(total) AS total,
    if(ifNull(greaterOrEquals(row_number, 26), 0), '$$_posthog_breakdown_other_$$', breakdown_value) AS breakdown_value
FROM
    (SELECT
        count AS total,
        breakdown_value AS breakdown_value,
        row_number() OVER (ORDER BY total DESC) AS row_number
    FROM
        (SELECT
            sum(total) AS count,
            breakdown_value
        FROM
            (SELECT
                count(DISTINCT e.person_id) AS total,
                ifNull(nullIf(left(toString(properties.$referring_domain), 400), ''), '$$_posthog_breakdown_null_$$') AS breakdown_value
            FROM
                events AS e
            WHERE
                and(greaterOrEquals(timestamp, toStartOfInterval(assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-03 00:00:00')), toIntervalDay(1))), lessOrEquals(timestamp, assumeNotNull(toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59'))), equals(event, '$pageview'))
            GROUP BY
                breakdown_value)
        GROUP BY
            breakdown_value
        ORDER BY
            breakdown_value ASC)
    ORDER BY
        total DESC,
        breakdown_value ASC)
WHERE
    notEquals(breakdown_value, NULL)
GROUP BY
    breakdown_value
ORDER BY
    if(equals(breakdown_value, '$$_posthog_breakdown_other_$$'), 2, if(equals(breakdown_value, '$$_posthog_breakdown_null_$$'), 1, 0)) ASC,
    total DESC,
    breakdown_value ASC
LIMIT 50000

insights.name: Pageview funnel, by browser
insights.description: This example funnel shows how many of your users have completed 3 page views, broken down by browser.
insights.hogql:
SELECT
    sum(step_1) AS step_1,
    sum(step_2) AS step_2,
    sum(step_3) AS step_3,
    arrayMap(x -> if(isNaN(x), NULL, x), [avgArray(step_1_conversion_times)])[1] AS step_1_average_conversion_time,
    arrayMap(x -> if(isNaN(x), NULL, x), [avgArray(step_2_conversion_times)])[1] AS step_2_average_conversion_time,
    arrayMap(x -> if(isNaN(x), NULL, x), [medianArray(step_1_conversion_times)])[1] AS step_1_median_conversion_time,
    arrayMap(x -> if(isNaN(x), NULL, x), [medianArray(step_2_conversion_times)])[1] AS step_2_median_conversion_time,
    groupArray(row_number) AS row_number,
    final_prop
FROM
    (SELECT
        countIf(notEquals(bitAnd(steps_bitfield, 1), 0)) AS step_1,
        countIf(notEquals(bitAnd(steps_bitfield, 2), 0)) AS step_2,
        countIf(notEquals(bitAnd(steps_bitfield, 4), 0)) AS step_3,
        groupArrayIf(timings[1], greater(timings[1], 0)) AS step_1_conversion_times,
        groupArrayIf(timings[2], greater(timings[2], 0)) AS step_2_conversion_times,
        rowNumberInAllBlocks() AS row_number,
        if(less(row_number, 25), breakdown, ['Other']) AS final_prop
    FROM
        (SELECT
            arraySort(t -> t.1, groupArray(tuple(toFloat(timestamp), uuid, arrayMap(x -> ifNull(x, ''), prop_basic), arrayFilter(x -> notEquals(x, 0), [multiply(1, step_0), multiply(2, step_1), multiply(3, step_2)])))) AS events_array,
            argMinIf(prop_basic, timestamp, notEmpty(arrayFilter(x -> notEmpty(x), prop_basic))) AS prop,
            arrayJoin(aggregate_funnel_array(3, 1209600, 'first_touch', 'ordered', [if(empty(prop), [''], prop)], [], arrayFilter((x, x_before, x_after) -> not(and(lessOrEquals(length(x.4), 1), equals(x.4, x_before.4), equals(x.4, x_after.4), equals(x.3, x_before.3), equals(x.3, x_after.3), greater(x.1, x_before.1), less(x.1, x_after.1))), events_array, arrayRotateRight(events_array, 1), arrayRotateLeft(events_array, 1)))) AS af_tuple,
            af_tuple.1 AS step_reached,
            plus(af_tuple.1, 1) AS steps,
            af_tuple.2 AS breakdown,
            af_tuple.3 AS timings,
            af_tuple.5 AS steps_bitfield,
            aggregation_target
        FROM
            (SELECT
                e.timestamp AS timestamp,
                person_id AS aggregation_target,
                e.uuid AS uuid,
                e.$session_id AS $session_id,
                e.$window_id AS $window_id,
                if(equals(event, '$pageview'), 1, 0) AS step_0,
                if(equals(event, '$pageview'), 1, 0) AS step_1,
                if(equals(event, '$pageview'), 1, 0) AS step_2,
                [ifNull(toString(properties.$browser), '')] AS prop_basic,
                prop_basic AS prop
            FROM
                events AS e
            WHERE
                and(and(and(greaterOrEquals(e.timestamp, toDateTime('2026-03-10 00:00:00.000000')), lessOrEquals(e.timestamp, toDateTime('2026-03-17 23:59:59.999999'))), in(event, tuple('$pageview'))), or(equals(step_0, 1), equals(step_1, 1), equals(step_2, 1))))
        GROUP BY
            aggregation_target
        HAVING
            greaterOrEquals(step_reached, 0))
    GROUP BY
        breakdown
    ORDER BY
        step_3 DESC,
        step_2 DESC,
        step_1 DESC)
GROUP BY
    final_prop
ORDER BY
    step_3 DESC,
    step_2 DESC,
    step_1 DESC
LIMIT 26
